return_type.name: { Gvec: secp.ProjectivePoint[]; Hvec: secp.ProjectivePoint[]; H: secp.ProjectivePoint }
{ Gvec: secp.ProjectivePoint[]; Hvec: secp.ProjectivePoint[]; Q: secp.ProjectivePoint }

type_ref.name: { alpha1?: any; beta2?: any; gamma2?: any; delta2?: any; ic?: any[] }
{ pi_a?: any[]; pi_b?: any[][]; pi_c?: any[]; protocol?: string; curve?: string }

branches.condition:
(
    outputScript.length === wpkh.length &&
    outputScript.every((b, i) => b === wpkh[i])
  )

(
    outputScript.length === tr.length &&
    outputScript.every((b, i) => b === tr[i])
  )

(
    witness &&
    witness.length === 2 &&
    witness[1]!.length === 33 &&
    prevoutScript &&
    prevoutScript[0] === 0x00 &&
    prevoutScript[1] === 0x14
  )

(
    witness &&
    witness.length === 1 &&
    (witness[0]!.length === 64 || witness[0]!.length === 65) &&
    prevoutScript &&
    prevoutScript[0] === 0x51 &&
    prevoutScript[1] === 0x20
  )

generic_args.name: { spent: boolean; txid?: string; vin?: number } | null

return_type.name: { deltaOut: bigint; raPost: bigint; rbPost: bigint }

type_ref.name: { encryptedAmount: Uint8Array; commitment: Uint8Array; anchor: Uint8Array; vout: number }[]

return_type.name: { confirmed: number; unconfirmed: number; total: number }
